title: AI and the Job Market in 2026
summary: AWS Developers discusses practical job-hunting tactics for tech professionals in 2026, emphasizing networking over mass applications, personal branding, and the continued value of junior developers. The video argues that AI automates resume screening and job displacement, but historically jobs evolve rather than disappear, citing a transportation analogy.
writeup: AWS Developers examines how to stand out in the 2026 tech job market as AI handles resume screening. The discussion covers networking, personal branding, and the Feynman Principle as tactics for candidates, and it argues that junior developers will evolve rather than be replaced. That argument is grounded in a comparison to transportation jobs, which transformed instead of disappearing.
